import io
import string
import list

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next_color(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn label(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut state = Color.Red
mut i = 0
let n = list.len(tokens)
while i < n
  match list.get(tokens, i)
  when Some(tok)
    if tok == "next"
      state = next_color(state)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(label(state))
